saxena-v-martinez-hernandez-et-al-2025-0.lesson: Pro-se filer; log as volume data point. No partner exposure.

state-v-saher-2025-02-11.lesson: Scrub every filing for prompt text before submission; ChatGPT artifacts signal unreviewed output.

gonzalez-v-texas-taxpayers-and-research-.lesson: Lexis AI output must be Shepardized against primary sources; initial denial of AI use escalates exposure.

fora-financial-asset-securitization-v-te.lesson: Reply briefs get the same verification as opening briefs; courts strike fabricated quotes on sight.

strike-3-holdings-llc-v-doe-2025-01-22.lesson: Judges now recognize AI-hallucination patterns; one unverified citation triggers scrutiny of the entire brief.

arajuo-v-wedelstadt-et-al-2025-01-22.lesson: Blaming a 'corrupted research tool' is no defense; attorneys must read every cited case before filing.

united-states-v-hayes-2025-01-17.lesson: Denying AI use under questioning converts a citation error into professional sanction and future discipline exposure.

strong-v-rushmore-loan-management-servic.lesson: Pro-se filer; log as volume data point.

kohls-v-ellison-2025-01-10.lesson: Ask every expert witness about AI use and verification; a struck declaration can sink the underlying case.

obrien-v-flick-and-chamberlain-2025-01-1.lesson: Pro-se filer; log as volume data point.

al-hamim-v-star-hearthstone-2024-12-26.lesson: Pro-se filer; log as volume data point.

letts-v-avidien-technologies-2024-12-16.lesson: Pro-se filer; log as volume data point.

carlos-e-gutierrez-v-in-re-noemi-d-gutie.lesson: Pro-se filer; log as volume data point.

rubio-v-district-of-columbia-dhs-2024-12.lesson: Pro-se filer; log as volume data point.

gauthier-v-goodyear-tire-rubber-co-2024-.lesson: Mandate a primary-source verification pass on every AI draft and require client disclosure when sanctions follow.

leslie-v-iq-data-international-2024-11-2.lesson: Pro-se filer; log as volume data point.

berry-v-stewart-2024-11-14.lesson: Quoting contract language not in the record is a Rule 11 trap; cross-check every quoted clause against the filed document.

vargas-v-salazar-2024-11-01.lesson: Pro-se filer; log as volume data point.

churchill-funding-v-732-indiana-2024-10-.lesson: OSCs for false pleadings now follow a single unverified cite; Shepardize before every CMC statement.
